roadmap.hero.title: Build your learning roadmap
roadmap.hero.text: Choose a stack and visualize a clear path to grow.
roadmap.empty: Select a stack to generate your roadmap
roadmap.tip.title: Tip
roadmap.tip.text: Don't try to learn everything at once. Focus on consistency.
roadmap.data.python.label: Python
roadmap.data.python.backend.label: Backend
roadmap.data.python.backend.tip: Django is the most requested in job listings. FastAPI is growing fast for modern APIs.
roadmap.data.python.fullstack.label: Fullstack
roadmap.data.python.fullstack.tip: Combining Django on the backend with React on the front is the most requested combo.
roadmap.data.python.data.label: Data
roadmap.data.python.data.tip: SQL is mandatory. Pandas is the first step, Spark is the next level.
roadmap.data.python.ai.label: AI / Machine Learning
roadmap.data.python.ai.tip: PyTorch dominates research and is growing in production. Scikit-learn is essential for classical ML.
roadmap.data.javascript.label: JavaScript
roadmap.data.javascript.frontend.label: Frontend
roadmap.data.javascript.frontend.tip: React is required in nearly 80% of frontend job listings. TypeScript is an increasingly common requirement.
roadmap.data.javascript.fullstack.label: Fullstack
roadmap.data.javascript.fullstack.tip: Next.js has become the market standard for fullstack JS. Node on the backend with Express or Fastify.
roadmap.data.java.label: Java
roadmap.data.java.backend.label: Backend
roadmap.data.java.backend.tip: Spring Boot is dominant in the Java market. Quarkus is growing in cloud-native environments.
roadmap.data.java.fullstack.label: Fullstack
roadmap.data.java.fullstack.framework: Spring Boot + React, Spring Boot + Angular
roadmap.data.java.fullstack.tip: Java on the backend with React or Angular on the front is a common combo at large enterprises.
roadmap.data.csharp.label: C#
roadmap.data.csharp.backend.label: Backend
roadmap.data.csharp.backend.tip: .NET 8 is modern and performant. Azure is the natural cloud for the Microsoft ecosystem.
roadmap.data.csharp.fullstack.label: Fullstack
roadmap.data.csharp.fullstack.tip: Blazor is interesting if you want pure C# fullstack. ASP.NET + React is the most requested in job listings.
roadmap.data.ruby.label: Ruby
roadmap.data.ruby.backend.label: Backend
roadmap.data.ruby.backend.tip: Rails still dominates the Ruby market. Widely used in startups and companies like Shopify and GitHub.
roadmap.data.ruby.fullstack.label: Fullstack
roadmap.data.ruby.fullstack.tip: Hotwire is Rails' modern bet for fullstack without much JS. React is the most requested option.
roadmap.data.rust.label: Rust
roadmap.data.rust.backend.label: Backend
roadmap.data.rust.backend.tip: Actix-web and Axum are the most used frameworks. Rust is highly sought after in high-performance systems and fintech.
roadmap.data.rust.systems.label: Systems / Embedded
roadmap.data.rust.systems.tip: Rust is replacing C/C++ in embedded systems and WebAssembly. Highly valued at infra and cloud companies.
roadmap.data.golang.label: Go
roadmap.data.golang.backend.label: Backend
roadmap.data.golang.backend.tip: Go is the standard infra language at large companies. Gin is the most requested framework in job listings.
roadmap.data.golang.devops.label: DevOps / Cloud
roadmap.data.golang.devops.tip: Kubernetes, Docker and Terraform are written in Go. Knowing Go opens doors directly to senior DevOps roles.
roadmap.data.typescript.label: TypeScript
roadmap.data.typescript.frontend.label: Frontend
roadmap.data.typescript.frontend.tip: TypeScript is a requirement in virtually all modern frontend jobs. Angular already uses TS natively.
roadmap.data.typescript.fullstack.label: Fullstack
roadmap.data.typescript.fullstack.tip: NestJS is the most requested TypeScript backend in job listings. tRPC is a growing trend for end-to-end typed fullstack.
roadmap.data.typescript.backend.label: Backend
roadmap.data.typescript.backend.tip: NestJS dominates TypeScript backend in larger companies. Fastify is lighter and growing fast.
roadmap.data.networking.label: Networking
roadmap.data.networking.infra.label: Infrastructure / Sysadmin
roadmap.data.networking.infra.tip: Linux is mandatory. Knowing troubleshooting and automation makes a big difference in the market.
roadmap.data.networking.fttx.label: FTTx / ISP
roadmap.data.networking.fttx.tip: Knowledge of OLT, VLAN and PPPoE is essential. Very strong in the ISP market.
roadmap.data.networking.routing.label: Routing & Switching
roadmap.data.networking.routing.tip: CCNA is the entry point. BGP and OSPF are strong differentiators.
roadmap.data.networking.wireless.label: Wireless
roadmap.data.networking.wireless.tip: Understanding RF and interference is what separates basic from professional.
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.label: Cybersecurity
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.pentest.label: Pentest / Red Team
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.pentest.tip: A strong foundation in networks and web is mandatory. Pentest is not an easy entry point.
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.soc.label: SOC / Blue Team
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.soc.tip: Log and incident analysis is the core. An excellent entry point into the field.
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.grc.label: GRC
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.grc.tip: Less technical, but highly valued at large companies and banks.
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.forense.label: Digital Forensics
roadmap.data.cybersecurity.forense.tip: A niche and advanced field. Widely used in investigation and digital forensics.
roadmap.data.cloud.label: Cloud
roadmap.data.cloud.aws.label: AWS
roadmap.data.cloud.aws.tip: AWS dominates the market. Cloud Practitioner certification is a great start.
roadmap.data.cloud.azure.label: Azure
roadmap.data.cloud.azure.tip: Very strong in companies that use Microsoft and .NET.
roadmap.data.cloud.gcp.label: GCP
roadmap.data.cloud.gcp.tip: Very strong in data and analytics. BigQuery is a huge differentiator.
roadmap.data.cloud.devops.label: DevOps / Cloud Engineer
roadmap.data.cloud.devops.tip: Docker + Kubernetes + Terraform is the strongest combo in the market.
